## Registry Checklist

- [ ] Add model to `docs/assets/style-registry.js`.
- [ ] Add compatibility scores for every content type.
- [ ] Add page-level allowed styles if this model should appear in a switcher.
- [ ] Verify Style Atlas matrix renders the new model.
- [ ] Verify at least one page demonstrates a structural layout difference.

## Page Preview Checklist

- [ ] Pick the page content type before choosing visual treatment.
- [ ] Add the model ID to that page's allowed style list.
- [ ] Store page-local style choice only when the layout changes the workflow.
- [ ] Keep incompatible styles visible as experimental or risky when they teach a useful contrast.
- [ ] Confirm desktop and mobile layouts do not collapse into only color changes.
